data.title: Scalable Infrastructure
data.description: The website is built on a cloud-based architecture to handle large volumes of traffic efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes cloud services such as AWS or Google Cloud with load balancing and auto-scaling features.

data.title: Microservices
data.description: Employs a microservices architecture allowing independent scaling and development of services.
data.technical_spec: Deployed using container technologies like Docker and orchestrated with Kubernetes.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Implements a CDN to ensure fast content delivery globally.
data.technical_spec: Uses services like Cloudflare or Akamai for edge caching.

data.title: Serverless Functions
data.description: Certain dynamic aspects leverage serverless computing for efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Hosting functions on platforms like AWS Lambda or Google Cloud Functions.

data.title: Secure API Gateway
data.description: APIs are routed through a secure gateway for monitoring and management.
data.technical_spec: Integrates with leading API management tools for traffic management and security.
